High Council of Scribes

Registry of the Eternal Chamber • Anno Domini MCCX

Presiding Luminaries

menu_book

High Archivist

Elder Valerius Thorne

Overseer of the Forbidden Repositories and master of the ink-well. Responsible for the preservation of original scripts.

Status: Vigilant
workspace_premium

Master of Seals

Lady Elara Vane

Custodian of the Imperial Signet and the wax of truth. Her word validates the laws of the realm.

Status: Presiding
auto_stories

Chronicler of Runes

Aethelred the Silent

The only council member permitted to handle the Living Parchment. He transcribes the murmurs of the ley lines into readable decree.

Magically Attuned Term: Perpetual

Decrees & Interpretations

history_edu
The Third Edict of Silentium
14 Days Past

Henceforth, all magical artifacts retrieved from the Sunken Spires must be registered with the Master of Seals within one lunar cycle. Failure to comply results in permanent banishment...

The Reinterpretation of Soul-Binding
22 Days Past

Clarification on Article IV: Soul-binding of inanimate objects for the purpose of domestic labor is now restricted to licensed magi of the third circle or higher...

Council Registry

Active Members 03 / 05
Pending Rulings 12
Chamber Temperate Mystical

"In Truth, We Scribe. In Silence, We Rule."
